title: WRAPAROUND CARE COORDINATION - 211info
text: HILLSBORO RECOVERY CENTER WRAPAROUND CARE COORDINATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides care coordination and wraparound treatment planning for youth. Services may include community-based treatment, day treatment, treatment foster care, respite, psychiatric residential treatment, or other individualized services. 5250 NE Elam Young Parkway Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: Youth ages 0-21 must meet the following criteria: -Currently struggling in several areas such as home, school, or social relationships -Involved with two or more systems such as Special Education, Child Welfare, Juvenile Services, Mental Health, Developmental Disabilities Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (503) 846-2288 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 846-2288 Alternate (503) 846-4528 Support Team Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for referral packet and more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call for information LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Washington County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Next to Hawthorn Farm TriMet MAX stop Services: Wraparound Facilitation/Community Support Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CIVIL COMMITMENT PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - WASHINGTON COUNTY CRISIS LINE MENTAL HEALTH CARE FACILITIES - HAWTHORN WALK-IN CENTER SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ALCOHOL, DRUG, AND GAMBLING ADDICTION SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - CENTER FOR ADDICTIONS TRIAGE AND TREATMENT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - MENTAL HEALTH REFERRALS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HILLSBORO RECOVERY CENTER
